---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or behavior change for FolderDrop
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that FolderDrop doesn't currently support? Describe
the underlying need, not just the requested solution.

## Proposed Solution

A clear, concise description of what you'd like FolderDrop to do.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you've considered, and why they
fall short.

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots of similar behavior in another app (e.g. Finder), or
anything else that helps explain the request.

---

Before submitting, please check [docs/roadmap.md](../../docs/roadmap.md) to
see if this is already planned, and
[docs/implementation-history.md](../../docs/implementation-history.md) in
case a similar approach has already been tried and documented as rejected.
